overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a player walking through a dense forest at night using a flashlight. The scene features atmospheric lighting with the flashlight beam illuminating grass and tree trunks while moonlight filters through the canopy, creating a tense and immersive environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest path at night

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark forest, sweeping the flashlight beam across the grassy path ahead to navigate between trees

entered.detail: tall pine trees silhouetted against the dark night sky, forming a dense wall ahead
illuminated grass and low vegetation in the bright yellow flashlight beam
thick dark tree trunk on the left side of the path
thick dark tree trunk on the right side framing the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a dense forest at night. The flashlight illuminates a patch of grass and undergrowth ahead, revealing tall pine trees in the distance. The camera moves steadily forward between tree trunks on either side, with the beam of light revealing the textured bark and forest floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest interior with closely spaced trees

events.description: slight turn to the right to navigate between closely spaced tree trunks

agents.ego_description: navigating through the forest interior, adjusting direction slightly to avoid tree trunks while maintaining forward momentum

entered.detail: distinctive white-barked tree visible in the distance ahead, standing out against dark pines

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the forest interior, the camera navigates between closely spaced trees. The flashlight beam sweeps across the terrain as the player makes slight adjustments to avoid obstacles. A distinctive white-barked birch tree becomes visible in the distance, marking a point of interest ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large birch tree trunk in dense forest

events.description: slowing down and tilting upward as approaching the large birch tree trunk directly ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing approach toward a large birch tree, examining the white bark texture and surrounding vegetation with the flashlight beam

entered.detail: large white-barked tree trunk directly ahead, filling the center of the frame
dead branches and twigs scattered on the forest floor to the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player approaching a large birch tree trunk, slowing down as they get closer. The flashlight illuminates the distinctive white bark in detail, and the camera tilts slightly upward to examine the tree. The surrounding forest remains dark and dense, with the beam revealing grass and fallen branches on the forest floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense, nocturnal forest that culminates in the discovery of a singular, striking tree. It begins with a steady forward movement through thick undergrowth, where a flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal textured pine bark and a forest floor of grass. As the camera navigates between closely spaced trunks, the beam sweeps across the terrain to avoid obstacles before spotting a distinctive white-barked birch tree in the distance. The scene then shifts as the player slows their pace to approach this landmark, with the light focusing on the intricate details of the white bark. Finally, the camera tilts upward to examine the birch tree while the surrounding woods remain shrouded in deep shadow and fallen branches.
